name: smart-travel-guide
description: Smart Travel Guide - Web application for travel planning with map integration (Đồ án Thực tế CNPM)

scripts.db:check:
echo '👉 Best way: Start the app (npm run dev), go to /admin, enter your webhook secret, and click the green "Check DB Consistency" button.
   It will call the new db.check event and show a full report of expected vs actual collections, old duplicates, etc.'
scripts.db:drop-unknown: echo 'Use the admin panel or POST {"event":"db.dropUnknown"} to /api/webhook (with x-webhook-secret header).'
